title: Migamigos
description: Companions from your favorite videogames and animes that feel alive and are useful!
body:
![Migamigos picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c2dff126f15245b2b87a7b4537723c86a7c88d7.png)

Migamigos is a mod that adds diverse companions from different videogames and animes! They will follow you around and protect you from the evil mobs!

Every amigo comes with their own set of attacks and animations for them!

You can change how they behave, give them stuff to carry, equip them with armor and level them up to make them stronger!

The stats of every Amigo can be changed via datapacks! If you find the mod unbalance, or want to change the difficulty of it, I highly recommend to do so through datapacks!

THIS MOD IS IN A VERY EARLY ACCESS!

It currently adds 5 Amigos for you to develop a friendship with!

![Migamigos picture](https://imgur.com/w9gwIXq.png)

Cocogoat: A very cool range Amiga! She can be found in Meadows, Stony Peaks, Windswept Biomes and the Cherry Grove Biome!

![Migamigos picture](https://imgur.com/13W3LQd.png)

Wavelyn: A Disciple filled with the Holy Spirit! She can be found in Plains, Birch Forests and the Cherry Grove Biome!

![Migamigos picture](https://imgur.com/jtONBTC.png)

Claymore: A fearless Warrior ready for a battle! He can be found in Forests, Taigas and Birch Forests!

![Migamigos picture](https://imgur.com/WNf4cVx.png)

Pollypounce: A sea-pirate looking for adventures with Captain Beakbeard

![Migamigos picture](https://imgur.com/weKKqsq.png)

Shybroom: A maid with the intention of cleaning an entire mansion and keeping monsters away!
